name: Timur Moiseenko
bio: Developer and systems administrator with 10+ years of experience. I focus not just on writing code, but on building solutions that deliver results. I have worked both in small teams and on large-scale projects. Right now I am actively growing in DevOps, which helps me build reliable applications and keep them stable and scalable in production.
about: I have hands-on experience with PHP 5.6/7/8, Python 3, and JavaScript. I built solutions for WordPress and WooCommerce, including custom themes, plugin development, and non-standard business logic. I also worked with 1C-Bitrix on custom components, templates, and Symfony-based extensions. My stack includes OctoberCMS, Laravel 6+, FastAPI, Symfony 5, and CodeIgniter 3. I build user interfaces with Vue 2/3 and have some experience with Alpine.js. I design REST and GraphQL APIs, use Git and Docker in daily development, and work confidently with MySQL, PostgreSQL, and Oracle. I have experience both in small teams of up to 5 people and in larger teams of up to 50. I also manage Windows and Linux servers, monitor infrastructure with Zabbix, Prometheus, and Grafana, and have worked with Yandex Cloud, Google Cloud, and Timeweb Cloud. I read technical documentation freely in English and use it in day-to-day work. I have also published several plugins for the open-source Moonshine admin panel and apply DevOps practices in the projects I lead.

competencies.label: Reliable backend development
competencies.description: Scalable Laravel and Symfony applications, API integrations, architecture design, and maintainable server-side code.

competencies.label: CMS architecture
competencies.description: Advanced WordPress, WooCommerce, 1C-Bitrix, and OctoberCMS solutions: themes, plugins, custom modules, and business logic.

competencies.label: APIs and integrations
competencies.description: REST and GraphQL APIs for web and mobile products, plus integrations with CRMs, payment gateways, and external services.

competencies.label: Frontend logic
competencies.description: Interactive Vue 2/3 interfaces, real-time features, admin panels, and frontend integration with backend services.

competencies.label: Infrastructure and DevOps
competencies.description: Linux/Windows server administration, Docker, cloud platforms, monitoring, and production stability.

competencies.label: Databases
competencies.description: Schema design, query optimization, and production work with MySQL, PostgreSQL, and Oracle.

projects.title: My Avoska
projects.description: Developed an API for a mobile grocery ordering app and an admin app for managing orders, staff, products, and content. Integrated payment systems and external services, plus synchronization with 1C. Implemented product search and filtering, push notifications, statistics, and reports. Stack: Python 3 + FastAPI, PostgreSQL, Docker, Vue 3 + Quasar, Dart + Flutter. Developed and maintained cloud infrastructure. System Administration + DevOps + Tech Lead.

projects.title: Laravel Store

experience.description: Private practice: Laravel application development, OctoberCMS plugins and custom functionality, GraphQL and REST APIs, YooKassa integrations, car marketplace portal, book portal, mobile dating app API improvements, Avito pickup-point CRM, and admin panels built with Backpack, Orchid, and Moonshine. Also built FastAPI services, Vue 2/3 interfaces, application architecture, database design, and DevOps workflows.

Monitored company IT infrastructure, billing systems, and business processes. Administered Zabbix, Nagios, Cacti, and Icinga2. Added systems and services to monitoring, built custom scripts and plugins, coordinated incident response, and developed the reporting system for the monitoring team.
Developed new features for websites using PHP 7, 1C-Bitrix, and Symfony. Worked in Agile / Scrum, estimated tasks, and performed code reviews.
Maintained and administered an online events platform. Managed servers in Yandex Cloud and supported a Laravel + Vue application.
Integrated frontend markup into WordPress and built custom solutions for websites and e-commerce systems on top of the platform.
Integrated frontend markup into WordPress, implemented custom solutions for websites and e-commerce systems, worked with CodeIgniter 3 and Laravel, and integrated payment and CRM APIs.
Administered network and server architecture, virtualization systems, and a Panasonic mini-PBX. Troubleshot issues, supported employees, and maintained office equipment.
Monitored the company IT infrastructure, billing systems, and business processes. Resolved issues in business applications and databases, tracked tablespaces, archived logs, and free disk space.
